ShortDescription.Value: Fixes the bug where businesses in the city do not import goods from DLC harbors.

Publish.LongDescription:
## Why this fix is needed
Businesses in the city do not purchase or import goods from Bridges & Ports DLC harbors at all. Even when the harbor has stock and is otherwise operating, buyers may still ignore it and send their trucks to other freight facilities or external road connections instead.
In simple terms, the game looks at the main harbor building to decide what goods that harbor can supply, but the DLC harbor does not report the goods managed by its own child storage buildings correctly. As a result, the harbor has stock, but businesses still do not treat it as a valid supplier.
This breaks the expected behavior of the DLC harbor and makes it much less useful in normal city logistics.
## What this mod fixes
This mod fixes that behavior so DLC harbors can be used correctly for resource purchasing and importing.
